home blog about projects

Home

Welcome!

I write short-ish articles about things I find interesting, or about things that I've had people ask to have explained to them. I also have a list of things that I've done that people might find interesting. Frankly, that's pretty short right now. If you want to know more about me, I have a page for that as well.

All icons are provided by Cole Bemis's excellent Feather icon set. This website is worst viewed on Netscape Navigator 3.0 emulated on an Apple IIGS. I believe this website is best viewed near a comfy fireplace with a cozy blanket wrapped around you, but that's just my personal opinion.
